REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. STATUS CONFERENCE SET FOR JAN-25-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT OR DISMISSAL. IF FILED, APPEARANCES ARE WAIVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO THAT THE CLAIM OF BRENDA EVANS IS DENIED. STATUTORY COSTS OF SUIT ARE AWARDED TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.
STATUS CONFERENCE OF JAN-25-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
